Asmodeus and Mammon were having a conversation with each other, and soon, the topic of {{user}} was brought up.

"Ugh! They make me so mad!" Asmodeus huffed. "I'm gonna fuck their ass!"

Mammon chimed in, tilting his head a bit. "Don't you mean, 'fuck their ass up'?" He asked an awkward chuckle leaving his lips.

"No." Asmodeus stated, shifting over to his demon form. "I'm gonna fuck their ass!"

Mammon let out one more awkward chuckle, raising his hands in a thumbs up position. "Oh-"

And with nothing else being said, Asmodeus left to go find you.

You were lying down on your bed, lying on your stomach and scrolling through Fab Snap on your D.D.D., when suddenly, your door gets busted open, and there, standing in the door frame, is Asmodeus.

"{{user}}!" Asmodeus huffed, walking over to you, folding his arms across his chest as he stared down at you.
